languages.text: {n}Почти мгновенно по телу растекается жидкое пламя. Каждый ваш нерв пронзает боль... и начинает медленно отступать по мере того, как ваше тело адаптируется. Вас бьет крупная дрожь, а пот мгновенно пропитывает одежду.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Выдаем бафф и +1 к DW_Batoshski_Reputation_counter удаляем
Стартуем этюд DW_VenomResistance
Выдаем бафф DW_VenomResistance_1_buff

Выдаем бафф и +1 к DW_Batoshski_Reputation_counter удаляем
Стартуем этюд DW_VenomResistance
Выдаем бафф DW_VenomResistance_1_buff

languages.text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads throughout your body. Pain pierces every nerve... and begins to slowly recede as your body adapts. A large tremor hits you, and sweat instantly soaks through your clothes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Почти мгновенно по телу растекается жидкое пламя. Каждый ваш нерв пронзает боль... и начинает медленно отступать по мере того, как ваше тело адаптируется. Вас бьет крупная дрожь, а пот мгновенно пропитывает одежду.{/n}

languages.text: {n}液体状の炎が瞬時に全身に広がり、神経を貫くような痛み。しかし、体が適応していくにつれて、徐々に痛みは和らぐ。大きな震動が襲い、汗が衣服を瞬時に染み渡らせる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads throughout your body. Pain pierces every nerve... and begins to slowly recede as your body adapts. A large tremor hits you, and sweat instantly soaks through your clothes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 液体状の炎が瞬時に全身に広がり、神経を貫くような痛み。しかし、体が適応していくにつれて、徐々に痛みは和らぐ。大きな震動が襲い、汗が衣服を瞬時に染み渡らせる。

languages.text: {n}Presque instantanément, vous avez l'impression que des flammes liquides se répandent dans votre corps. La douleur jaillit de tous vos nerfs... puis commence lentement à se dissiper à mesure que votre organisme s'adapte. Un violent frisson vous parcourt, provoquant une suée intense qui trempe immédiatement vos vêtements.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads throughout your body. Pain pierces every nerve... and begins to slowly recede as your body adapts. A large tremor hits you, and sweat instantly soaks through your clothes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Presque instantanément, vous avez l'impression que des flammes liquides se répandent dans votre corps. La douleur jaillit de tous vos nerfs... puis commence lentement à se dissiper à mesure que votre organisme s'adapte. Un violent frisson vous parcourt, provoquant une suée intense qui trempe immédiatement vos vêtements.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Neredeyse o anda sıvı alev, tüm vücuduna yayılıyor. Acı, her sinirini delip geçiyor... Vücudun uyum sağladıkça acı azalıyor. Büyük bir titreme seni sarıyor ve ter, giysilerini anında sırılsıklam ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads throughout your body. Pain pierces every nerve... and begins to slowly recede as your body adapts. A large tremor hits you, and sweat instantly soaks through your clothes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Neredeyse o anda sıvı alev, tüm vücuduna yayılıyor. Acı, her sinirini delip geçiyor... Vücudun uyum sağladıkça acı azalıyor. Büyük bir titreme seni sarıyor ve ter, giysilerini anında sırılsıklam ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Casi al instante, sientes fuego líquido recorrer tu cuerpo. El dolor atraviesa todos y cada uno de tus nervios... y empieza a amortiguarse poco a poco mientras tu cuerpo se adapta. Un fuerte temblor te sacude, y el sudor empapa tu ropa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads throughout your body. Pain pierces every nerve... and begins to slowly recede as your body adapts. A large tremor hits you, and sweat instantly soaks through your clothes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Casi al instante, sientes fuego líquido recorrer tu cuerpo. El dolor atraviesa todos y cada uno de tus nervios... y empieza a amortiguarse poco a poco mientras tu cuerpo se adapta. Un fuerte temblor te sacude, y el sudor empapa tu ropa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}霎时间，火焰般的灼热流经全身，疼痛刺击着每一根神经……当你的身体逐渐适应后，疼痛才开始慢慢消退。一阵剧烈的颤抖袭来，汗水瞬间浸透了你的衣服。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads throughout your body. Pain pierces every nerve... and begins to slowly recede as your body adapts. A large tremor hits you, and sweat instantly soaks through your clothes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}霎时间，火焰般的灼热流经全身，疼痛刺击着每一根神经……当你的身体逐渐适应后，疼痛才开始慢慢消退。一阵剧烈的颤抖袭来，汗水瞬间浸透了你的衣服。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Beinahe sofort breitet sich eine flüssige Flamme in deinem Körper aus. Der Schmerz reizt jeden Nerv ... und zieht sich dann langsam zurück, während dein Körper sich anpasst. Eine große Erschütterung durchzieht dich, und Schweiß durchnässt explosionsartig deine Kleidung.{/n}
